title: Dumplings Delight Rewrapped
description: More dumplings for Farmer's Delight. Port of the original for a newer version
body:
**Currently only the NeoForge 1.21.1 version works for Farmer's Delight 1.3+ (Fabric & 1.20 will update later)**

This is a a port of [Dumpling's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/dumplings-delight) by [FoggyHillSide](https://modrinth.com/user/FoggyHillside) for a newer minecraft version

You can view the changes (and other info) [here](https://github.com/Joshcraft2002/Dumplings-Delight-Rewrapped/blob/main/README.md).

📖 About:

Dumplings Delight is a mod that adds various Chinese style dumplings.

There are a variety of dumplings in China, such as jiaozi, baozi, wonton, tangyuan, etc. Chinese style dumpling is an important part of Chinese culture, and the old Chinese saying goes “好吃不如饺子”, which means there’s nothing more delicious than dumplings.

With this mod, you’ll be able to prepare some popular types of Chinese style dumplings. You can also try to eat them with garlic cloves or vinegar (This is a traditional way to eat dumplings in northern China).
